creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: mat
Date: Fri Nov 15 15:12:58 2013
New Revision: 333875
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333875

Log:
  Add p5-String-RewritePrefix 0.006, rewrite strings based on a set of
  known prefixes.
  
  PR:		ports/180299
  Submitted by:	Anes Mukhametov <anes@anes.su>

Added:
  head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/
  head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 15:08:12 2013	(r333874)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 15:12:58 2013	(r333875)
@@ -2686,6 +2686,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-String-LRC
     SUBDIR += p5-String-Parity
     SUBDIR += p5-String-Random
+    SUBDIR += p5-String-RewritePrefix
     SUBDIR += p5-String-RexxParse
     SUBDIR += p5-String-Similarity
     SUBDIR += p5-String-TT

Added: head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 15:12:58 2013	(r333875)
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# Created by: Anes Mukhametov <anes@anes.su>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	String-RewritePrefix
+PORTVERSION=	0.006
+CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	anes@anes.su
+COMMENT=	Rewrite strings based on a set of known prefixes
+
+LICENSE=     ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=        dual
+
+USES=	perl5
+USE_PERL5=	configure
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/distinfo	Fri Nov 15 15:12:58 2013	(r333875)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (String-RewritePrefix-0.006.tar.gz) = 94f69b311437ec2a128803d08f625c0511672b84882321a3d74f8157007a2ead
+SIZE (String-RewritePrefix-0.006.tar.gz) = 11002

Added: head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/pkg-descr	Fri Nov 15 15:12:58 2013	(r333875)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+String::RewritePrefix - rewrite strings based on a set
+of known prefixes
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/String-RewritePrefix/

Added: head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-String-RewritePrefix/pkg-plist	Fri Nov 15 15:12:58 2013	(r333875)
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/String::RewritePrefix.3.gz
+%%SITE_PERL%%/String/RewritePrefix.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/String/RewritePrefix/.packlist
+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/String/RewritePrefix
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/String
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/String
